title: Fiscal year
doc_html:
§1212.  Fiscal year

The fiscal year of the board shall be the same as the fiscal year of the governing authority.  

Acts 1991, No. 120, §1, eff. June 30, 1991.
doc_text:
§1212.  Fiscal year
The fiscal year of the board shall be the same as the fiscal year of the governing authority.
Acts 1991, No. 120, §1, eff. June 30, 1991.
